name: @clearline/data-access-security
description: Account-security data-access layer for clearline-web (EPIC-CW-022 / US-CW-035): React Query hooks over /api/security for password change, authenticator-app 2FA setup/disable, active-session management, and trusted-device removal. No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-022 (US-CW-035 Account Security — Password, 2FA, Sessions & Trusted Devices).
